name: local-model-relay
description: Local OpenAI-compatible relay with provider routing, failover, usage tracking, and a browser control panel.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/config-store.mjs && node --check src/state-store.mjs && node --check src/proxy.mjs && node --check src/provider-test.mjs && node --check src/speed-test.mjs && node --check src/wire-api.mjs && node --check src/usage.mjs && node --check src/outbound-proxy.mjs && node --check src/upstream-fetch.mjs && node --check public/js/main.mjs && node --check scripts/launch-server.mjs && node --check scripts/run-isolated-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/failover-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/reconnect-failover-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/stream-preface-failover-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/quota-exhaustion-long-task-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/usage-estimate-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/usage-cache-fields-test.mjs && node --check scripts/outbound-proxy-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/sticky-routing-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/codex-compat-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/real-test-model-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm run test:usage-cache && npm run test:outbound-proxy && npm run test:failover && npm run test:stream-preface-failover && npm run test:quota-exhaustion && npm run test:reconnect-failover && npm run test:usage-estimate && npm run test:sticky-routing && npm run test:codex-compat && npm run test:real-test-model
